items.title_en: Version of AI tool 'too powerful for public' released to public
items.title_zh: 人工智能工具版本“对公众来说太强大”向公众发布
items.desc_en: Claude Fable 5 is a version of Anthropic's Claude Mythos, an AI program which caused a stir among technology, finance, and government leaders
items.desc_zh: Claude Fable 5 是 Anthropic 的 Claude Mythos 的一个版本，这是一个在技术、金融和政府领导人中引起轰动的人工智能程序

items.title_en: Semiconductor shorts pile on as winning trade reverses
items.title_zh: 随着盈利交易逆转，半导体空头不断增加
items.desc_en: Investors' favorite trade is suddenly the one they can't stop betting against.
items.desc_zh: 投资者最喜欢的交易突然变成了他们无法停止做空的交易。

items.title_en: Karmelo Anthony trial live updates: Jurors deliberating, can consider manslaughter charge - Dallas News

items.title_zh: 投资成长型股票不像赌马。这是托德戈登的一个新贸易想法
items.desc_en: In horse racing, once the thoroughbreds are in the gate, your bet is locked. There's nothing you can do to manage risk from that point forward.
items.desc_zh: 在赛马比赛中，一旦纯种马进入大门，你的赌注就被锁定了。从那时起，您将无法采取任何措施来管理风险。

items.title_en: Kalshi trading in 'perps' crosses $1 billion in volume within a week of launch
items.title_zh: Kalshi 的“perps”交易量在推出一周内就突破了 10 亿美元
items.desc_en: A spokesperson for the company said that the product is the fastest growing in the prediction market platform's history.
items.desc_zh: 该公司发言人表示，该产品是预测市场平台历史上增长最快的产品。

items.title_en: White House border czar Tom Homan blames New York Gov. Hochul for promised ICE surge
items.title_zh: 白宫边境沙皇汤姆·霍曼指责纽约州州长霍楚尔承诺增加 ICE 数量
items.desc_en: Gov. Kathy Hohul in May signed a New York law that barred agreements with ICE that made it easier for the agency to detain immigrants who had been jailed.
items.desc_zh: 州长凯西·霍胡尔 (Kathy Hohul) 五月签署了一项纽约法律，禁止与 ICE 达成协议，使该机构更容易拘留被监禁的移民。

items.title_en: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: Apple, Micron Technology, Coherent, DraftKings, J.M. Smucker & more
items.title_zh: 中午涨幅最大的股票：Apple、Micron Technology、Coherent、DraftKings、J.M. Smucker 等
items.desc_en: Here are the companies making headlines in midday trading.
items.desc_zh: 以下是午盘交易中成为头条新闻的公司。

items.title_en: As LIV Golf faces a Saudi funding cliff, CEO says to take PIF 'at their word'
items.title_zh: LIV Golf 面临沙特资金悬崖，首席执行官表示要“相信 PIF 的话”
items.desc_en: PIF is set to stop funding the golf league after the 2026 season, though O'Neil could not guarantee that the final four tournaments will take place.
items.desc_zh: PIF 将在 2026 赛季结束后停止资助高尔夫联盟，但奥尼尔无法保证最后四场比赛的举行。

items.title_en: Trump says Iran shot down US helicopter and vows to respond
items.title_zh: 特朗普称伊朗击落美国直升机并发誓做出回应
items.desc_en: Two crew members of the Apache helicopter that crashed following the attack were rescued by an American sea drone.
items.desc_zh: 袭击后坠毁的阿帕奇直升机的两名机组人员被一架美国海上无人机救起。

items.title_en: SpaceX IPO explained: The price is set, but retail allocation still up in the air
items.title_zh: SpaceX IPO解释：价格已定，但零售分配仍悬而未决
items.desc_en: Charles Schwab, Fidelity, Robinhood, SoFi and Morgan Stanley's E-Trade are among the brokerage platforms making SpaceX shares available.
items.desc_zh: 嘉信理财 (Charles Schwab)、富达 (Fidelity)、Robinhood、SoFi 和摩根士丹利 (Morgan Stanley) 的 E-Trade 等经纪平台均提供 SpaceX 股票。

items.title_en: There's still plenty of runway on the tech boom, analysts say
items.title_zh: 分析师表示，科技繁荣仍有足够的空间
items.desc_en: Low credit spreads and strong profits are among the factors that have been holding off a peak.
items.desc_zh: 较低的信贷利差和强劲的利润是阻止其见顶的因素之一。

items.title_en: FIFA pres. on ticket prices: The World Cup being in America is a 'once-in-a-lifetime opportunity'
items.title_zh: 国际足联新闻。关于票价：在美国举办世界杯是“千载难逢的机会”
items.desc_en: CNBC’s Sara Eisen sits down with FIFA President Gianni Infantino and AB InBev CEO Michel Doukeris to discuss FIFA’s World Cup sponsorship deal with AB InBev, the tournament’s economic impact, concerns
items.desc_zh: CNBC 的萨拉·艾森 (Sara Eisen) 与国际足联 (FIFA) 主席詹尼·因凡蒂诺 (Gianni Infantino) 和百威英博 (AB InBev) 首席执行官米歇尔·杜克里斯 (Michel Doukeris) 坐下来讨论国际足联 (FIFA) 与百威英博 (AB InBev) 的世界杯赞助协议、赛事的经济影响以及担忧

items.title_en: Anthropic releases Mythos-like AI model to the public two months after private rollout rocked Wall Street
items.title_zh: 在私人推出震撼华尔街两个月后，Anthropic 向公众发布了类似 Mythos 的人工智能模型
items.desc_en: Anthropic said the broad release is possible because of new safeguards that block responses in specific high-risk areas.
items.desc_zh: Anthropic 表示，由于新的保障措施阻止了特定高风险区域的响应，因此广泛发布是可能的。

items.title_en: Social Security funds could run short by 2032, program's Trustees warn - NPR
items.title_zh: 计划受托人警告说，到 2032 年，社会保障基金可能会出现短缺 - NPR
items.desc_en: Social Security funds could run short by 2032, program's Trustees warn  NPRSocial Security retirement trust fund will run dry in 2032 unless Congress acts  CNNSocial Security shortfall expected to acc
items.desc_zh: 计划受托人警告说，到 2032 年，社会保障基金可能会出现短缺，除非国会采取行动，否则 NPR 社会保障退休信托基金将在 2032 年耗尽。

items.title_en: Social Security retirement trust fund may be depleted in 2032, new trustees report finds
items.title_zh: 新受托人报告发现社会保障退休信托基金可能会在 2032 年耗尽
items.desc_en: The Social Security Administration has released a report with new projections as to when the trust funds that help pay benefits may be depleted.
items.desc_zh: 社会保障管理局发布了一份报告，其中对帮助支付福利的信托基金何时可能耗尽进行了新的预测。

items.title_en: House Republicans push $70 billion immigration funding package toward passage

items.desc_en: The U.S. House on Tuesday is scheduled to vote on a $70 billion immigration enforcement funding package after months of debate.
items.desc_zh: 经过数月的辩论后，美国众议院定于周二就 700 亿美元的移民执法资金计划进行投票。

items.title_en: Farage says Reform has contacted X 'at highest level' over fake AI ads

items.desc_zh: 这些虚假广告的主角是英格兰银行行长，该银行已敦促人们举报这些广告。

items.desc_en: The demonstration, in the western city of Herat, was broken up after police are alleged to have opened fire.
items.desc_zh: 据称，警方开枪后，西部城市赫拉特的示威活动被驱散。

items.desc_zh: 据报道，阿富汗妇女参加罕见抗议活动导致两人死亡

items.desc_en: Meta has accused the EU of "regulatory overreach" and says its decision will allow tech giants like OpenAI free access to WhatsApp.
items.desc_zh: Meta 指责欧盟“监管越权”，并表示其决定将允许 OpenAI 等科技巨头免费使用 WhatsApp。

items.title_en: Israeli air strikes hit Lebanese city of Tyre despite Iranian warning to stop attacks
items.title_zh: 尽管伊朗警告停止袭击，以色列仍对黎巴嫩城市提尔发动空袭

items.desc_en: Eric Trump and Donald Trump Jr. celebrated a deal with Alt5 Sigma that generated roughly $500 million for the Trump family. The company's shares are down 93%.

items.title_zh: 习近平和金正恩誓言朝鲜访问结束后将加强关系
items.desc_en: Xi has wrapped up a two-day visit to Pyongyang, his first official trip to North Korea since 2019.
items.desc_zh: 习近平结束了对平壤为期两天的访问，这是他自 2019 年以来首次正式访问朝鲜。

items.title_en: Conflicts on rise globally, highest level since WWII, data shows - NPR
items.title_zh: 数据显示，全球冲突加剧，达到二战以来最高水平 - NPR
items.desc_en: Conflicts on rise globally, highest level since WWII, data shows  NPRSee more headlines & perspectives on Google News
items.desc_zh: 数据显示，全球冲突不断加剧，达到二战以来的最高水平 NPR 在 Google 新闻上查看更多头条新闻和观点

items.title_en: Trump booed in New York as he becomes first US president to attend NBA Finals
items.title_zh: 特朗普成为第一位出席 NBA 总决赛的美国总统，在纽约遭到嘘声
items.desc_en: The catcalls came after ticketholders faced airport-style security to enter the venue at Madison Square Garden.
items.desc_zh: 购票者在进入麦迪逊广场花园的场馆时要面临机场式的安检，随后引发了阵阵嘘声。

items.title_en: Russia's fuel crisis intensifies as Ukraine steps up strikes on occupied territories
items.title_zh: 乌克兰加大对被占领土的打击力度，俄罗斯燃料危机加剧
items.desc_en: Kyiv has made it difficult for Moscow to provide military and civilian supplies to the territories it occupies.
items.desc_zh: 基辅使莫斯科难以向其占领的领土提供军事和民用物资。

items.title_en: Could humanoid robots be heading for the battlefield?
items.title_zh: 人形机器人会走向战场吗？
items.desc_en: Armed forces are experimenting with humanoid robots, but battlefield deployment is some way off.
items.desc_zh: 武装部队正在试验人形机器人，但距离战场部署还有一段距离。

items.title_en: OpenAI plans to go public, intensifying investment race with Anthropic
items.title_zh: OpenAI拟上市，与Anthropic的投资竞赛加剧
items.desc_en: The company behind ChatGPT filed its plans one week after Anthropic did the same.
items.desc_zh: ChatGPT 背后的公司在 Anthropic 提交计划一周后也提出了同样的计划。

items.title_en: Apple unveils Siri AI makeover as Tim Cook bids farewell
items.title_zh: 蒂姆·库克 (Tim Cook) 告别之际，苹果推出 Siri AI 改造版
items.desc_en: The technology giant also revealed a series of new child safety features amid widespread scrutiny over "nudification" apps.
items.desc_zh: 在对“裸体”应用程序的广泛审查中，这家科技巨头还推出了一系列新的儿童安全功能。

items.desc_en: The former leader of crypto platform FTX, currently serving a 25-year sentence, on Monday officially applied to be pardoned.
items.desc_zh: 加密货币平台 FTX 的前领导人目前正在服刑 25 年，周一正式申请赦免。

items.title_en: Trump to meet AI leaders to discuss US investment in their companies
items.title_zh: 特朗普将与人工智能领导人会面，讨论美国对其公司的投资
items.desc_en: The US president said on Friday he expects to meet the leaders of top AI companies next week.
items.desc_zh: 美国总统周五表示，他预计下周将与顶级人工智能公司的领导人会面。

items.title_en: Raspberry Pi raises profit forecast as AI demand grows
items.title_zh: 随着人工智能需求的增长，Raspberry Pi 提高了利润预期
items.desc_en: The firm said it expected to deliver adjusted earnings of at least $38m (£28.2m) for the first half of 2026.
items.desc_zh: 该公司表示，预计 2026 年上半年调整后收益至少为 3800 万美元（2820 万英镑）。

items.desc_zh: 随着比特币价格再次下跌，这里有一些最棘手的加密货币术语的指南。
